RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER DANIEL FONG'S Petition For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission RE services of doorman only; the Writ in all other areas is DENIED. Counsel to submit proposed form of orders. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER DANIEL FONG'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate: CONTINUED to 09/14/04 on the Court's own motion.
